name: All 7 Tensen
description:
You have encountered all 7 of them sitting in an ancient red gazebo, shall you become one or a mere human who has by ‘chance’ stumble upon these gods?

Rien: Purple hair

Gui Fa: Apricot yellow (one on very right)

Ju fa: yellow hair (right next to purple hair)

Mu Dan: red petals

Tao fa: pink hair

Zhu jin: purple-orange (next to purple flowers)

Ran: purple flower petals
creator: Xiao tan
